message:
feat: graduate 2 manual stubs replaced by auto-repair (bd-k5q5.8.8)

Removed hand-written stubs now handled by auto-repair:
- shared/index.ts → Pattern 3 (monorepo escape) generates stubs dynamically
- qualisero-pi-agent-scip/dist/extension.js → Pattern 1 (dist→src fallback)

Kept stubs that can't be auto-repaired:
- nicobailon-interview-tool/form/ (parent dir needed for canonicalize)
- aliou-pi-processes/{constants,utils,components} (intra-extension imports)

E2E verified: 223 total, 221 clean, 2 auto-repaired, 0 failures.
